name: Janet AI
long_description:
Janet AI (janet.ai) is the first AI-native ticket management system, built for modern engineering teams and tool stacks. Janet AI doesn’t wait for your manual work. Janet plugs into your meetings, Slack, Discord, SMS, email, GitHub, and coding agents to auto-track tasks and progress, auto-enrich ticket context, surface insights across your team, and more.

Check out janet.ai to get started today!
